Research-paper learning app

Learnify: turn doomscrolling into learning

The research and learning feed shown in the Reel is publicly available on iPhone as Learnify.

What you’re getting

Open the verified App Store listing from developer Deon Menezes, then use the feed as a starting point and read the original source before sharing a claim.

Use it well

A three-step starting point.

  1. 01

    Confirm the listing is Learnify — Addictive Learning by Deon Menezes.

  2. 02

    Choose the technology, AI, science, or research topics you want in your feed.

  3. 03

    Open the linked paper or publisher page when you need the full context behind a card.

Verified destinations

Open the sources.

Download Learnify on the App Store ↗ Follow @deon_tech ↗

Important context

The Reel caption omitted the store URL; the link above is the current verified public listing for the app shown.
